name: ks-ssh
description: KS SSH - Powerful browser-based SSH with terminals, ports, and file management

scripts.build: cp node_modules/xterm/lib/xterm.js src/public/js/xterm.js && cp node_modules/xterm/css/xterm.css src/public/css/xterm.css && cp node_modules/xterm-addon-fit/lib/xterm-addon-fit.js src/public/js/xterm-addon-fit.js && cp node_modules/socket.io/client-dist/socket.io.min.js src/public/js/socket.io.min.js && npx pkg . --targets node18-linux-x64 --output ks-ssh && chmod +x ks-ssh && echo '[KS-SSH] Binary built: ./ks-ssh' && echo '[KS-SSH] Usage: ./ks-ssh --port 3000'
